title: thelypteris tristis
intro: Thelypteris tristis, also known as the sorrow fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and protecting against infections. Thelypteris tristis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
